gold_change_reason: Seed solution used configparser.write() which does not handle multiline values; new implementation adds continuation lines with tab indentation, handles large configurations natively, and ensures roundtrip parsing.
covered_requirements: The serialized file must preserve multiline values with continuation lines.
The serialize function must handle any number of sections and options without failure.
The serialized INI file must be valid and parseable by configparser.
implementation_notes: Custom serialize function writes multiline values with continuation lines using tab indentation.
Supports any number of sections and options by iterating over config.sections() and each section's items.
Produces valid INI file that configparser can parse back, preserving the exact multiline value.
